creator: hiroo.ono+freebsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 147089
diff to crypto.4 and crypto.9

Compared to src/sys/opencrypto/cryptodev.h, share/man/man4/crypto.4 and share/man/man9/crypto.9 lack some encryption method.
For crypto.4, the method strings are added in the order described in cryptodev.h (except for CRYPTO_CAMELLIA_CBC which was already there).
For crypto.9, the order is alphabetical because it seems to be so.
Maybe, the order in crypto.4 should be the same as in crypto.9.
